# Panipat Investments Hub

> Panipat Investments Hub (SPHPNP) is a premier platform offering financial services, stock analysis, unlisted space investments, and market tracking to empower investors.

## Main Sections
- [Home](https://www.sphpnp.com/): Overview of our investment services and tools.
- [About Us](https://www.sphpnp.com/about): Our mission, vision, and company background.
- [Services](https://www.sphpnp.com/services): Comprehensive financial services we offer.
- [Unlisted Space](https://www.sphpnp.com/unlisted-space): Pre-IPO and unlisted shares investment opportunities.
- [Open Account](https://www.sphpnp.com/open-account): Open your Demat and trading account.
- [Screener](https://www.sphpnp.com/screener): Advanced stock screening and financial analysis tool.
- [F&O](https://www.sphpnp.com/fno): Futures and Options market data and insights.
- [Learn](https://www.sphpnp.com/learn): Educational hub for stock market beginners and experts.
- [Recommendations](https://www.sphpnp.com/learn/recommendations): Expert stock picks and investment recommendations.
- [52 Week Tracker](https://www.sphpnp.com/52-week-tracker): Track stocks hitting their 52-week highs and lows.
- [Compare](https://www.sphpnp.com/compare): Compare stocks and financial instruments side by side.
- [Products](https://www.sphpnp.com/products): Financial products and tools for traders.
- [Calculators](https://www.sphpnp.com/brokerage-calculator): Brokerage and margin calculators.

## Support & Legal
- [Contact Us](https://www.sphpnp.com/contact): Get in touch for support, queries, and assistance.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.sphpnp.com/privacy-policy): How we handle and protect your data.
- [Cookie Policy](https://www.sphpnp.com/cookie-policy): Information on our cookie usage.
